description:
President Donald Trump-endorsed Ed Gallrein, a former Navy SEAL and Kentucky farmer, defeated a longtime Trump antagonist, GOP Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky.

Gallrein said during his victory speech, "Now my focus is on advancing the president's and the party's agenda to put America first and Kentucky always."

fulltitle: Ed Gallrein remarks after defeating Rep. Thomas Massie in GOP House primary
